modelDocIntro: These Markdown API documents are generated dynamically from the AI Studio model configuration. Each document includes the available model IDs, request fields, request examples, pricing rows, and common API errors for that model family.
modelDocSuffix: Includes available model IDs, request fields, examples, pricing, and common errors.
